assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio compatibility with GKE 1.30, mentions 'Istio 1.18+ supports GKE 1.30', and includes commands to verify current version and compatibility

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated 'Check Compatibility Matrix' section with commands to check current Istio version and verify GKE 1.30 compatibility

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Phase 2: Upgrade Istio Control Plane (if needed)' with the condition 'Only if current Istio version doesn't support GKE 1.30' and provides istioctl upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: While the response mentions sidecar injection and node drain procedures, it doesn't explicitly explain the mutating webhook mechanism or how it specifically relates to issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Phase 4: Workload Migration Monitoring' with commands to watch for sidecar injection issues and check pods with istio-injection=enabled

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple references to monitoring proxy status and versions, including 'istioctl proxy-status' commands and checking for proxy version consistency in the testing checklist

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific commands including 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -o jsonpath', 'istioctl proxy-status', and 'istioctl proxy-config' for checking versions and sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring and checking versions, it doesn't explicitly warn about traffic disruption risks from version mismatches between control plane and sidecars
